location: On a corpse inside a hut on the north side of Ailing Village in Weeping Peninsula.

source.name: Corpse in northern hut, Ailing Village

tactics: Approach from the Ailing Village Outskirts grace — the village is full of aggressive Frenzied Villagers gathered around a central pyre.
The shield sits in a hut on the village's north side, separate from Callu Baptismal Church at the south end (which holds different loot, including a Sacred Tear).
Don't linger near the crowd around the fire — several frenzied villagers can pile on at once.
lore: A light wooden shield carried by soldiers of the Frenzy-afflicted village, its yellow flame crest meant to warn outsiders away.

builds.name: Cheap early Strength block
builds.why: 94% physical negation for only 3.5 weight and 8 Strength — a strong disposable pick right at the start of the game.
